15.reason: [The condition checks only one side of the range (e.g., ch[i-1] >= 'a' but doesn't ensure ch[i+1] >= 'a'), so it may incorrectly allow mixed-type expansions like 'a-Z'. Also, it doesn't verify that both characters are of the same category.]

20.reason: [Variable 'w' is only reset inside the if-block; if the condition fails, 'w' retains its previous value from earlier iterations, causing incorrect '-' output or omission. Also, this logic doesn't handle non-expansion cases correctly when '-' appears but shouldn't expand.]
